description.value: > Ice Associated Domain: Water. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the cold resistance power of the Water domain. Body of Ice (Su): At 8th level, you can transmute your body and equipment to ice for a period of time. It takes a standard action to take on the form of ice, and you can end the transmutation with a free action on your turn. When you take on the form of ice, you are immune to cold and have DR 5/â, but you take twice the normal amount of damage from fire. You can take on the form of ice for a number of rounds per day equal to your cleric level. The rounds need not be consecutive. Replacement Domain Spells: 7thâ freezing sphere, 9thâ polar ray.
